summary: #80929 remains a narrow, non-security contributor-branch repair candidate for deterministic outbound delivery-error classification. Current main still treats the local-media allowlist rejection and Telegram overlong-message rejection as transient; the repair should stay in the existing two-file scope and use only a normal contributor-branch update path.

actions.reason: Repair the existing contributor branch instead of opening a replacement PR, rebasing, force-pushing, merging, or broadening delivery semantics.
Keep the broader issue open as related context; #80929 is only the bounded repair candidate for the two-pattern classifier subset.
Already-closed context ref; no closure action is valid.
Executable fix artifact for the deterministic applicator/repair runner.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #80929 in place by keeping its two deterministic permanent-error classifier additions and focused policy tests, updating the contributor branch only through a normal push if the branch is still open and maintainer_can_modify remains true.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Summary:
- Repair contributor PR #80929 in place, preserving @honor2030's two-file scope.
- Keep deterministic local-media allowlist rejection and Telegram overlong-message rejection classified as permanent delivery errors.
- Keep focused policy coverage in src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.policy.test.ts.

Verification:
- corepack pnpm exec tsx classifier proof for both deterministic strings
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.policy.test.ts
- git diff --check

Credit:
- Source PR: #80929 by @honor2030
- Related issue context: #66489 by @rtmuller and #75131 by @solosage1
validation_commands: corepack pnpm exec tsx -e "import { isPermanentDeliveryError } from './src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.ts'; const cases = ['Local media path is not under an allowed directory: ./some-local-file.png', 'Call to sendMessage failed! (400: Bad Request: message is too long)']; for (const message of cases) { if (!isPermanentDeliveryError(message)) throw new Error('expected permanent delivery error: ' + message); }"
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @honor2030 from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/80929.
Carry issue context credit for #66489 reporter @rtmuller and broader related report #75131 by @solosage1 in the PR body or maintainer note if the branch is repaired.

fix_actions.reason: unsupported validation command: corepack pnpm exec tsx -e "import { isPermanentDeliveryError } from './src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.ts'; const cases = ['Local media path is not under an allowed directory: ./some-local-file.png', 'Call to sendMessage failed! (400: Bad Request: message is too long)']; for (const message of cases) { if (!isPermanentDeliveryError(message)) throw new Error('expected permanent delivery error: ' + message); }"
